top_signals.title: ENN Is Said to Mull Dropping $12 Billion Buyout of Energy Unit
top_signals.summary: ENN Energy Holdings Ltd.’s biggest shareholder is considering abandoning a nearly $12 billion buyout offer for the Hong Kong-listed company, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: EU structural financial indicators: end of 2025
COOCON Joins Global AI Agent Foundation AAIF to Advance AI Agent Payments and MCP-Based Data Business
top_signals.summary: - Establishes a global collaborative network with more than 180 companies, including OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, and Microsoft - Joins discussions on AI agent payment and MCP data standards, accelerating its expansion into the global payment and data markets
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: 10% of e-scooter accidents  in Japan resulted from drunken driving in 2025
top_signals.summary: Of the 386 accidents involving specified small motorized two-wheel vehicles, including electric kick scooters, drunken driving was blamed for 43 of them.

top_signals.title: Lower House panel approves retrial system reform bill
top_signals.summary: The bill is expected to clear the Lower House on Tuesday and be enacted during the current Diet session ending in July.
